title: Implement mode-gated FIRE enforcement in trial workflows

log.message:
Created from Congress #85 verdict on: Should Show Trial FIRE verdicts have real enforcement consequences?

INVESTIGATION BRIEF (heartbeat

Source verdict: The crux here is simple: a FIRE verdict that does nothing is a lie to the audience, and systems that lie about their own consequences rot from the inside. The supermajority requirement is the tell — w...
Added trial_apply_fire_verdict activity to trial_act.py with mode-gating: standard sets status=meme, meme-mode exits immediately
mode-gated FIRE enforcement implemented and committed to temporal-workflows (d521d68)
